name: dev-workflows
description: General-purpose development workflow skills. Ships grill-then-plan (domain-aware grilling that sharpens terminology, captures decisions inline as CONTEXT.md/ADRs, then hands off to the superpowers planning pipeline), problem-description (generate interactive step-by-step HTML walkthroughs that explain a complex technical problem with concrete data), management-talk (reshape engineer-to-engineer updates for engineering-org leadership, shaped for the channel — JIRA, Slack, standup, email, or meeting talking-points), fit-gap-analysis (compare a spec/vision/competitor/RFP against a system as actually built — an evidence-first capability matrix + step-by-step user-journey comparison verified against the live system, rolled up into decisions), and naming-audit (verify a source list of claimed labels/values/mappings against a system's authoritative source of record item-by-item — trace each label to its bound field, pull the live authoritative value, compare wording, source-of-truth wins; outputs a fixed per-item card with verdict and the exact app+code path to check). More skills to come.
